title: Plump Pumpkin Fritters
excerpt: These fritters will be the favourite on your table. Even the kids will eat their veggies. PLUMP PUMPKIN FRITTERS WITH CARAMEL FRITTER BATTER: 750 ml cooked mashed pumpkin 2 eggs 5 ml salt 500 ml self-raising flour 15 ml baking powder 500 ml oil for frying the fritters. …
html:
These fritters will be the favourite on your table. Even the kids will eat their veggies.

PLUMP PUMPKIN FRITTERS WITH CARAMEL

FRITTER BATTER:

  • 750 ml cooked mashed pumpkin
  • 2 eggs
  • 5 ml salt
  • 500 ml self-raising flour
  • 15 ml baking powder
  • 500 ml oil for frying the fritters.

 

 

 

SYRUP:

  • 500 ml sugar
  • 250 ml water
  • 125 ml milk
  • 30 ml butter
  • salt
  • 10 ml cornflour/ maizena

 

METHOD:

Pumpkin fritters

  1. Mix the pumpkin, sugar and salt together.
  2. Mix the self-raising flour and baking powder together and stir it into the pumpkin.
  3. Spoon dollops into the hot oil. Fry until nicely browned and let it drain on kitchen paper.

Syrup

  1. Boil the sugar, water, milk, butter and salt together. The sugar must be dissolved.
  2. Mix the maizena with a little water and stir it into the sugar mixture.
  3. Let it boil until the sauce thickens.
  4. Pour the hot sauce over the fritters.
